text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
And since it's your birthday, I got you this special
present!

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text: Oh goodness, thank you so much, Falco.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, it's an acrylic bead set. I know you do
beadwork, so I think you'll really like this!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Aren't the aurora colors cute?! I bet they'd look
great on you!

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
Ohh, "angora" colors? What kind of colors are
those?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Ummm... I dunno how to say it. It's like a really
shimmery rainbow, that sort of... shifts in color?
Does that make sense?

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text: Ahh, like big soap bubbles do?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Oh, yeah! That, that, that! You nailed it, Acute!
